instructions: Web dashboard only. API calls via src/lib/api.ts — no direct Supabase service role. BrilliantGauge and brilliantPct are required headline UI. Encouraging copy only.

rules.rule: Do not suggest removing BrilliantGauge, brilliantPct from dashboard, or demoting Brilliant to a secondary metric.
Flag SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, non-public secrets, or server-only config in client components or NEXT_PUBLIC_ vars.
Backend calls should go through src/lib/api.ts fetchApi pattern, not hardcoded external URLs bypassing Next.js rewrite.
